creator: minotaur@itcons.net.ua
text:
I cannot build net-mgmt/net-snmp (cvsuped on 24th of June) on 9.0-CURRENT:


===>  Building for net-snmp-5.5_4
making all in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.5/snmplib
making all in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.5/agent
making all in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.5/agent/helpers
making all in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.5/agent/mibgroup
/bin/sh ../../libtool --mode=compile cc -I../../include -I. -I../../agent -I../../agent/mibgroup  -I../../snmplib -I/usr/include   -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -Ufreebsd9 -Dfreebsd9=freebsd9  -DAPPLLIB_EXP="/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.12.3/BSDPAN" -DHAS_FPSETMASK -DHAS_FLOATINGPOINT_H -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -fstack-protector -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.12.3/mach/CORE -c -o mibII/tcpTable.lo mibII/tcpTable.c
libtool: compile:  cc -I../../include -I. -I../../agent -I../../agent/mibgroup -I../../snmplib -I/usr/include -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -Ufreebsd9 -Dfreebsd9=freebsd9 -DAPPLLIB_EXP=/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.12.3/BSDPAN -DHAS_FPSETMASK -DHAS_FLOATINGPOINT_H -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -fstack-protector -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.12.3/mach/CORE -c mibII/tcpTable.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o mibII/.libs/tcpTable.o
mibII/tcpTable.c:94: error: field 'pcb' has incomplete type
mibII/tcpTable.c: In function 'tcpTable_load':
mibII/tcpTable.c:866: error: dereferencing pointer to incomplete type
mibII/tcpTable.c:868: error: dereferencing pointer to incomplete type
mibII/tcpTable.c:868: error: invalid application of 'sizeof' to incomplete type 'struct xinpgen' 
mibII/tcpTable.c:872: error: dereferencing pointer to incomplete type
mibII/tcpTable.c:876: error: dereferencing pointer to incomplete type
mibII/tcpTable.c:877: error: invalid application of 'sizeof' to incomplete type 'struct inpcb' 
mibII/tcpTable.c:881: error: dereferencing pointer to incomplete type
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.5/agent/mibgroup.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.5/agent.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.5.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp.




Enabling/disabling IPv6 support in build options menu does not affect the process: building stops in either cases.

How-To-Repeat: 1. Update ports tree
2. cd /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/
3. make
